title: Christmas Decorations
description: A Datapack that adds 32 new christmas decorations to the game with no resourcepack required!
body:
# 🎁 Christmas Decorations \[1.21.10\]

This simple Datapack adds **32** new christmas decorations to the game that can be placed using an item frame!

#### This datapack does NOT require a resourcepack! It is 100% Vanilla!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/T4rDwDdoPg8?si=-4nNWpWp_U5FSWya" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Decorations List:

[![grid](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1390381/description_7e22f5a7-214f-494c-926a-5587212078b1.png)](https://yoavtc.github.io/christmas-decorations/)

## Check out my other datapacks:

[![recent datapacks](https://yoavtc.work/widgets/recent_datapacks.jpg)](https://modrinth.com/user/yoav_tc/)

# Credits:

[BD Models](https://block-display.com/) for hosting a vast library of Block Display models, and the [Block Display Minecraft](https://discord.com/invite/VCeHfSd6Xa) community for creating them!

### Model Creators:

*   [q8h](https://block-display.com/author/q8h/) - Christmas Tree, Christmas Lights, Presents, Presents Tower
*   [Danyia](https://block-display.com/author/Daniya/) - Snowballs, Christmas Wreath, Hot Chocolate
*   [Rasterio\_](https://block-display.com/author/rasterio_/) - Snowman
*   [Snowouiii](https://block-display.com/author/moonoplay/) - Cookie Jar
*   [Minipowerrr](https://block-display.com/author/Minipowerrr/) - Snow Globe
*   [Herr\_Aleks](https://block-display.com/author/Herr_Aleks/) - Candy Cane
*   [little\_bearx](https://block-display.com/author/little_bearx/) - Gingerbread Men
*   [Clevit](https://block-display.com/author/baptistemaillard/) - Train Toy
*   [minecraft-heads.com](https://minecraft-heads.com/) - All ornaments
